title: ‘Our math is different’: Iran warns Gulf countries of ‘fourfold’ retaliation after Trump threat
summary_full: Iran's Vice President warned of a fourfold retaliation against nations supporting damage to its infrastructure, particularly its oil sector, following US President Trump's remarks. This threat underscores heightened tensions around Iran's energy assets amidst ongoing conflict and diplomatic efforts, including a proposed two-stage plan to the US.
